falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the previous 52-week high by 10% with a volume surge exceeding 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a blowoff top formation, directly contradicting the bottom pattern and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by confirming a strong upward trend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index breaks above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key long-term trendline would signal a sustained bullish trend, refuting the bottom pattern and proving the current HOLD signal incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average with a 3% gap
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish crossover would confirm a shift to an uptrend, invalidating the bottom pattern's expectation of continued weakness and falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
